title: Test Development Engineer
description:
An IC Test Development Engineer develops and implements automated test equipment and programs for design verification and production testing of integrated circuits (ICs). This includes designing electronic circuits, writing test software, and ensuring robust and cost\\-effective testing solutions. Develop the test hardware Load board and Probecards for the devices.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Test Program \\& Solution Development: Takes ownership of the entire test solution development process, from initial concept to implementation.
* Creating comprehensive test plans to cover all aspects of the chip's functionality.
* Sound knowledge on
 **Digital, Mixed signal, RF test methodologies** 
 . Experience in developing the test programs in ATE environment for Digital, mixed signal, RF devices.
* Device debug for Digital, Mixed Signal, RF devices using ATE tools and verify with bench Test results.
* Responsible for working with different teams for understanding the device datasheet and come up with a detailed Test procedure/plan to test the chip in ATE environment.
* Strong working experience in
 **Teradyne test systems like ETS (364/88/800\\), UltraFlex, J750, Magnum, Advantest V93K systems** 
 or any other ATE Tester.
* Build ATE hardware design (load board \\& probe card), PCB design tools and Signal Integrity analysis.
* Need to interact with the PCB design team for developing the necessary hardware – Test load board, bench board and probe cards.
* Knowledge on Device Characterization, testing at different temperatures.
* Knowledge on data extraction tool like Perl, Python will be added advantage.
* Performance Optimization: Improves testing processes and methodologies to ensure efficient and cost\\-effective testing.
* Documentation: Creates and maintains test documentation, including test plans, specifications, and procedures.
* Collaboration: Works closely with cross\\-functional teams, including design, manufacturing, and quality assurance, to ensure seamless integration and testing of ICs.
* Test Execution: Running tests on the manufactured silicon, including both pre\\-silicon (emulation) and post\\-silicon platforms.
* Expertise in High Speed Serdes Interface characterization and protocol compliance testing such as PCIe/Ethernet/SDI/CoaXpress/JESD204, MIPI D\\-PHY, MIPI CSI/DSI\\-2, USB and DisplayPort/HDMI etc.



  





  





**Required Skills and Qualifications:** 




  




* Education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or a related field.
* Candidate should have minimum5 years’ experience in semi\\-conductor testing in ATE.
* Experience in IC test development, with a strong understanding of automated test equipment (ATE) and test software.
* Programming: Proficiency in C/C\\+\\+ programming for test software development.
* Strong knowledge of electronic circuits and measurements.
* Ability to analyze test results, identify issues, and propose solutions.
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to IC testing.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills for collaboration and documentation.
* Ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.

title: iOS Developer
description:
**About Us:** 




 Paytm is India’s largest digital payments and financial services platform, leading the mobile QR revolution. We power millions of businesses and individuals, and we’re building scalable, resilient systems to serve half a billion Indians and beyond.
 



 Here at Paytm, technology isn't just about keeping up, it's about building the future. We believe the next generation of engineers must not only scale systems to billions but also leverage AI and GPT tools to accelerate innovation.
 



  





**About the role:** 




 We are looking for a passionate Native iOS Developer with 3 to 9 years of experience to join our engineering team. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in Swift and modern iOS architecture, along with experience building scalable, high\\-performance mobile applications.
 



  





**Job Title:** 
 Senior Software Engineer/Technical Lead – iOS
 



**Experience:** 
 3\\-9 years
 



**Location:** 
 Bengaluru
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* Design, develop, and maintain native iOS applications.
* Write clean, scalable, and high\\-performance code following best practices.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers and backend teams to define and deliver new features.
* Integrate RESTful APIs, SDKs, and third\\-party services.
* Ensure app performance, security, and reliability across devices and OS versions.
* Debug, optimize, and fix issues across multiple iOS devices.

* Experience with MVVM / Clean Architecture
* Experience publishing apps to the Apple App Store



  





**Good to Have:** 



* Experience building custom UI components and animations
* Familiarity with AI developer tools (Cursor / Copilot / Claude)
* Basic understanding of AI\\-assisted development or agentic frameworks

 B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science, IT, or a related field (or equivalent qualification)

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**The opportunity**
* Guidewire Claim Centre Support with 6 to 8 Yrs


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Guidewire Claim Center Support and Maintenance (Senior 6\\-8 years)

* Real time knowledge and experience on enterprise system integration, preferably from Insurance domain background.

* Should have understanding and experience of software development best practices.

* Prior Client facing experience
* Experience with tools like Service\\-now, JIRA, soap\\-UI, eclipse IDE, SVN, Jenkins.

**To qualify for the role, you must have**
* Guidewire CC Config
* Gosu Scripting, UI \\& Data Models
* Core Java, J2EE, XML, Web Services (SOAP/REST), ANT

**What We Offer**
 EY Global Delivery Services (GDS) is a dynamic and truly global delivery network. We work across six locations – Argentina, China, India, the Philippines, Poland and the UK – and with teams from all EY service lines, geographies and sectors, playing a vital role in the delivery of the EY growth strategy. From accountants to coders to advisory consultants, we offer a wide variety of fulfilling career opportunities that span all business disciplines. In GDS, you will collaborate with EY teams on exciting projects and work with well\\-known brands from across the globe. We’ll introduce you to an ever\\-expanding ecosystem of people, learning, skills and insights that will stay with you throughout your career.
   

  

* Continuous learning: You’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.

title: R & D Engineer
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 R\\&D Team Lead
   

  

  

  

  

**Your role and responsibilities:**
 In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research \\& Development (R\\&D) team.
   

  

 The work model for the role is:
   

  

 This role is contributing to the
 **Motion Business Drive Products Division in Bangalore, India**
**You will be mainly accountable for:**
* Working as an independent and reliable contributor in R\\&D projects with limited supervision.
* Performing various tasks in the assigned area (e.g., mechanics, electronics, thermal, software), from building concepts, gathering requirements to designing, implementing, integrating, testing, technology transfer or maintenance, and operations.
* Understanding and applying applicable processes, standards, guidelines, and requirements, including architectural and design constraints.
* Driving the achievement of assigned targets (quality, time, scope, cost) and raising and addressing risks.
* Understanding of Power Electronics device, Drives, PLCs \\& software tools to configure them.
* Good to have knowledge of network communication and configuration.
* Knowledge in configuring \\& setup of power electronic device through PC Tools


**Qualifications for the role:**
* B.E/B\\-Tech/ME/MTech in Computer Science, Electronics, Electrical, Instrumentation with 3 to 8 years of Software development experience with C\\+\\+ / C\\#, .NET Framework, Microsoft WPF
* Strong and Hands\\-on Experience in Windows Application Development using Microsoft Technologies
* Strong concepts on Advanced C\\+\\+/ C\\#, .Net , OOPS, LINQ
* Strong knowledge of TypeScript, JavaScript including practical experience with JavaScript frameworks, ideally vue.js
* Experience in Design Patterns, Design Principles and WPF (Windows Presentation Foundation), MVVM, Windows Application Development
* Experience in NSubstitute \\& Basics of ASP.Net, Angular JS with Scrum Processes
* Experience in end\\-to\\-end product development using SDLC practices


**More about us:**
 ABB Motion provides pioneering technology, products, solutions and related services to industrial customers to increase energy efficiency, improve safety and reliability, and maintain precise control over processes. The portfolio includes motors, generators and drives for a wide range of applications in all industrial sectors.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
   

  

 Recruitment Fraud Warning
   

  

 ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.
   

  

 View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home
   

  

 For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how\\-to\\-apply/fraud\\-warning

title: Lead Software Engineer, Backend
description:
**🚀 Why Headout?** 




**We’re a rocketship: 9\\-figure revenue, record growth, and profitable** 




 With $130M in revenue, guests in 100\\+ cities, and 18 months of profitability, Headout is the fastest\\-growing marketplace in the travel industry, and we’re just getting started. We've raised $60M\\+ from top\\-tier investors and are building a durable company for the long term — because that's what our mission needs and deserves. We’re growing, profitable and nowhere near done.
 



  





**What we do is important** 




 In an increasingly digital world, there is a desperate need to augment our human experience by getting us to interact with the real world around us and the people in it. At Headout, our mission is to be the easiest, fastest, and most delightful way to head out to a real\\-life experience — from immersive tours to museums to live events and everything in between.
 



  





**Why now?** 




 The foundation is strong. The opportunity ahead is even bigger. We’ve hit profitability, built momentum, and proven the model — but there’s so much more to build. If you’re looking to join a company where the trajectory is steep and your impact is real, this is the moment.
 



  





**Our culture** 




 Reinventing the travel industry isn't easy, but that's the fun part.
 



 We care deeply about ownership, craft, and impact, and we’re here to do the best work of our careers. We won’t pretend like it’s for everyone but if you’re a builder who loves solving tough problems, you’ll feel right at home. Read more about our unique values here:
 
 https://bit.ly/HeadoutPlaybook
 




  





**👩 💻 The role** 




 As the Lead Software Engineer, Backend at Headout, you'll be diving deep into the heart of our technical ecosystem. Your realm will encompass the design and construction of the core modules on both the application and infrastructure layers. With a team of young, dynamic, and driven professionals by your side, you'll tackle intricate architectural and design challenges. From clustering to replication, from databases to building systems, and infrastructure automation, you'll be hands\\-on. Your contributions won't just be internal; you'll have the chance to contribute to open\\-source libraries and components. Ultimately, you'll be the guardian of concurrent, efficient, and scalable services that form the backbone of the Headout ecosystem.
 



  





**🤩 What Makes This Role Stand Out** 



* **Ownership** 
 : Take the reins and mold a high\\-performing team. Your leadership will be key in recruiting, nurturing, and ensuring the success of a top\\-tier team that will be the backbone of our initiatives.
* **Innovation** 
 : Don't just follow the norm. Here, you'll be encouraged to think outside the box, spearheading projects from concept to completion and infusing them with fresh, effective solutions that can redefine our approach.
* **Explore the Tech Landscape** 
 : Embrace the opportunity to work in a rich technological environment. From varied services to distinct platforms and databases, you'll touch multiple facets of tech, ensuring a dynamic work experience. We believe in using the right tool for the job. Experience the versatility of multiple tech stacks, allowing you to pick and choose the best technologies that align with project needs.
* **Growth and Influence** 
 : It's not just about scaling; it's about influence. Play a pivotal role in the company's ambitious 5x growth trajectory, directly impacting our direction and shaping architectural solutions that set the foundation for our future.



  





**🎯 Essential skills \\& experience** 



* 6\\+ years of full time professional experience in software development, with hands\\-on experience in one or more software programming languages.
* Prior experience serving as a technical lead or leading engineering teams through complex initiatives.
* Experience leading system design and architecture efforts, including reliability, scalability, and design patterns for both new and existing systems.
* Experience working across the full software development lifecycle, encompassing coding standards, code reviews, source control, build and release processes, testing, and production operations.
* Strong ability to architect and design effective solutions for loosely defined or ambiguous problem statements.
* Proven capability to provide technical leadership and mentorship, guiding engineers toward high\\-quality design and implementation.



  





**💫 Bonus** 



* Past experience working in travel, local experiences \\& hospitality.
* Past experience in starting or scaling a successful startup.

title: Assistant System Engineer
description:
Job Summary: 
 



  





 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Hardware Engineer to design and develop evaluation kits and reference designs for Infineon Microcontroller devices. The successful candidate will be responsible for creating schematic designs using Cadence, as well as bringing up and testing new Microcontroller Units (MCUs). This is an excellent opportunity for a talented engineer to join our team and contribute to the development of innovative technologies.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities:
 



  





 · Design and develop evaluation kits and reference designs for new MCUs, including schematic design, PCB layout, and prototype testing
 



 · Design schematic using Cadence, ensuring compliance with industry standards and company specifications
 



 · Bring up and test MCU boards, including debugging and troubleshooting of hardware and software issues
 



 · Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams, including software, firmware, and system engineering, for integration of evaluation kits with overall system
 



 · Develop and maintain technical documentation, including user manuals, datasheets, and test reports
 



 · Participate in design reviews and provide feedback to ensure high\\-quality design and reliability of evaluation kits
 



 · Stay up\\-to\\-date with industry trends and emerging technologies, and apply this knowledge to improve reference designs and development
 



  





 Requirements:
 



  





 · Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electronics and communication Engineering, or a related field
 



 · Minimum 2\\~3 years of experience in hardware design and development
 



 · Proficiency in Cadence schematic design tools, including OrCAD and Allegro
 



 · Strong knowledge of digital and analog circuit design principles.
 



 · Strong understanding of basic serial communication protocols, and extended communication protocols such as SMIF, SDIO, CAN, MIPI, etc.
 



 · Strong understanding on power supply and motor control designs.
 



 · Experience with bring\\-up and testing, including debugging of hardware and software issues
 



 · Excellent problem\\-solving skills, with the ability to analyze complex technical issues and develop creative solutions
 



 · Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively with cross\\-functional teams
 



 · Ability to work in a fast\\-paced environment, with multiple projects and deadlines
 



  





 Nice to Have:
 



  





 · Experience with PCB layout and design, including knowledge of signal and power integrity principles
 



 · Familiarity with programming languages, such as C, C\\+\\+, or Python
 



 · Knowledge of industry standards and regulations, including FCC, CE, and RoHS
 



  





 Contact person: Ronak.Desai@infineon.com

title: SDET
description:
**Job Description**
****Strategic Imperative:****
 The
 **Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET)** 
 plays a critical role in ensuring our products meet the highest standards of quality, reliability, and performance. By building robust automated test frameworks and integrating quality practices throughout the development lifecycle, this role accelerates product delivery, reduces defects, and enables the engineering team to deliver scalable, customer\\-focused solutions.
   

  

**Prodege**
 A cutting\\-edge marketing and consumer insights platform, Prodege has charted a course of innovation in the evolving technology landscape by helping leading brands, marketers, and agencies uncover the answers to their business questions, acquire new customers, increase revenue, and drive brand loyalty \\& product adoption. Bolstered by a major investment by Great Hill Partners in Q4 2021 and strategic acquisitions of Pollfish, BitBurst \\& AdGate Media in 2022, Prodege looks forward to more growth and innovation to empower our partners to gather meaningful, rich insights and better market to their target audiences.
   

  

 As an organization, we go the extra mile to “Create Rewarding Moments” every day for our partners, consumers, and team. Come join us today!
   

  

**Primary Objectives**
* Design, develop, and maintain automated tests for web applications and services that expose http or RPC API endpoints
* Partner closely with engineers and product teams to embed quality into every phase of the SDLC.
* Drive continuous integration and deployment testing to streamline release cycles.
* Identify and resolve performance, scalability, and reliability issues through automated validation.
* Provide mentorship and support to developers and QA team members on automation best practices.
* Ensure compliance with security, privacy, and industry quality standards.
* Develop strong domain knowledge, and regularly access/communicate value and risk with test cases.


****Qualifications** 
 \\-
 *T***
*o perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each job duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.*
**Detailed Job Duties**
* Develop, maintain, and enhance automated test suites to improve testing efficiency and coverage.
* Collaborate with product managers and engineers to define acceptance criteria and test strategies for new features.
* Build and maintain tools for performance testing, security testing, and integration validation.
* Participate in code reviews, providing feedback on testability and quality.
* Analyze test results, identify root causes of defects, and provide actionable recommendations.
* Support the team during production releases with regression testing and validation.
* Acquire and apply knowledge of the business domain to assess risk levels and prioritize test cases accordingly.
* Continuously monitor and improve automation processes for scalability and reliability.


****What does SUCCESS look like?****
 In this role, success will mean driving measurable improvements in software quality and delivery speed. Within the first year, the SDET will have achieved automation coverage of 90% or higher for critical features and regression testing, helping to significantly reduce release cycle times through well\\-integrated, automated pipelines. They will establish a scalable and maintainable automation framework adopted across teams, leading to early defect detection and prevention, and a marked decrease in production issues. By fostering strong collaboration with engineering, product, and QA teams, the SDET will integrate quality practices seamlessly into the development process, ensuring a culture of continuous improvement and excellence.
   

  

**The MUST Haves**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in Computer Science, or Engineering; or equivalent years of relevant work experience.
* Three plus (3\\+) years of experience in software quality engineering, with a focus on test automation.
* Strong proficiency in one or more programming languages: Python, Java, C\\#, or JavaScript.
* Hands\\-on experience with automation frameworks/tools such as Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright.
* Demonstrated knowledge of API testing, using tools such as Postman or REST Assured.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab, GitHub Actions).
* Deep understanding of QA methodologies, testing principles, and SDLC best practices.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.


**The Nice To Haves**
* Experience with performance testing tools like JMeter or Gatling.
* Exposure to cloud\\-based environments (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Familiarity with containerization and orchestration technologies like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Knowledge of security testing practices and tools.
* ISTQB certification or similar QA\\-related credentials.
* Experience with behavior\\-driven development (BDD) using Cucumber or similar tools.

title: Tech Lead - Founding Team
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Founding Lead Engineer / Full\\-Stack Mobile Architect (Co\\-Founder \\& Equity)
 **Employment Type:** 
 Part\\-time / Flexible / Co\\-Founder
 



  





**Location:** 
 Remote
   




**The Vision** 

 Most developers spend their careers writing code to build someone else's dream. They optimise features for incremental growth, maintain legacy systems, and take home a salary while the founders build a legacy.
 



 We are looking for the rare exception.
 **We are looking for builders, not job seekers.** 




 We are looking for a visionary, a relentless executor, and a true "one\\-man army" to join the founding team at Ridezz. This is an invitation to stop being just an employee and start being an owner. If you are hungry to take a product from zero to one and architect a platform that actually matters, you belong here.
 


**The Reality (Please Read Carefully)** 

 This is not a comfortable, salaried 9\\-to\\-5\\. We are in the trenches, building our MVP. We are looking for an entrepreneurial technical partner who can dedicate a few highly focused hours a day—keeping your current day job is absolutely encouraged—to build our mobile platform from the ground up in exchange for a substantial equity stake.
 



**Only apply if you are open to taking the startup risk.** 



**Your Mission (What You Will Build)** 
* **The Masterpiece:** 
 You will be the sole architect of our cross\\-platform mobile app, making the foundational technical decisions that will eventually scale to thousands of users.
* **The Engine:** 
 You will design, build, and deploy a robust backend, ensuring our platform is as powerful and scalable as it is beautifully designed.
* **The Culture:** 
 As our very first technical leader, the DNA of our future engineering team will start with your code, your standards, and your hustle.


**Who You Are** 
* **Battle\\-Tested (4\\+ Years Experience):** 
 You have a minimum of 4 years of deep, hands\\-on experience building, scaling, and shipping tech products. You've seen what works, what breaks, and how to fix it.
* **The Solo Virtuoso:** 
 You are a full\\-stack powerhouse. You don't need a product manager to hand\\-hold you, or a QA team to catch your mistakes. You build, ship, and iterate autonomously.
* **The Mobile Master:** 
 You have a proven track record of bringing elegant, high\\-performance mobile apps to life from a completely blank canvas.
* **The AI Advantage (Bonus):** 
 Experience in AI development—whether building or integrating machine learning models and LLMs—is a massive advantage as we look to build smart, future\\-proof features.
* **The Entrepreneur at Heart:** 
 You understand that true wealth and impact aren't created by hourly wages alone, but by ownership, grit, and building something the market desperately needs.


**The Reward** 
* **True Ownership:** 
 A generous founding equity stake. When Ridezz wins, you win.
* **Ultimate Autonomy:** 
 No micromanagement and no pointless corporate meetings. Work when you are most inspired, as long as we are hitting our milestones together.
* **The CTO Pathway:** 
 This is your fast track to the executive table. As we secure funding and scale, you will have the opportunity to transition into the Chief Technology Officer role, leading the very empire you built.



 If you are ready to bet on yourself, step out of the background, and build a legacy, apply below. Let's change the game together.

* Present performance results and insights clearly to both technical and non\\-technical collaborators.
* Continuously adjust new tools and techniques to improve testing efficiency and effectiveness.


**What do we expect:**
* 4\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in Performance Testing and Engineering roles.
* Strong experience with Load Testing tools such as LoadRunner/Performance Center, JMeter.
* Ability to design, develop, and maintain performance test scripts for web and API.
* Identify and recommend Non\\-Functional Requirements (NFRs) for performance testing through detailed analysis of product specifications and business SLAs.
* Implement comprehensive performance tests including Load, Stress, Endurance and Scalability testing.
* Analyze test results, identify bottlenecks, and collaborate with development teams for tuning and optimization.
* Prepare and present detailed performance reports and dashboard.
* Communicate insights and actionable recommendations effectively to technical and business collaborators.
* Hands\\-on experience with major cloud platforms (AWS and Azure preferred) for leveraging cloud\\-based load generation.
* Ability to correlate performance test results with infrastructure metrics (CPU, memory, disk I/O, network latency) for root cause analysis.

title: Associate – Water Supply Network Planning
description:
**Responsibilities**
* Leads the technical delivery of a water supply network planning and modelling. Carries out hydraulic calculations, analysis and investigations for clients using Infoworks WS Pro software for modelling projects and tasks, including preparation of reports, figures and other documents to a high level of grammatical and technical presentation.
* Carries out project works in accordance with our Integrated Management System (IMS). Work alongside project managers and junior team members to ensure efficient delivery. Delivers through teams, not individually.
* Demonstrates industry best practice for model build, calibration and system performance assessments, including leakage and demand analysis, pressure management and infrastructure / growth planning.
* Demonstrates how Infoworks WS Pro models can be used to support the development of zone management plans, water supply strategies and demand management plans.
* Uses Infoworks WS Pro in\\-built tools to successfully investigate complex water network operational scenarios.
* Applies sound engineering judgement to resolve modelling anomalies to improve overall modelling confidence and communicates all risks and limitations on use of hydraulic models to the project team and the client.
* Works without supervision, direct others and ensures their work is verified by an appropriate professional.
* Leads continuous digital improvement and innovation on water hydraulic modelling and can identify and implement opportunities to streamline processes and data management.
* Successfully supports, coaches and mentors hydraulic modelling professionals to achieve a good standard of hydraulic modelling, embedding a culture of successful project delivery whilst also holding them to account, reducing re\\-work and supporting the continuous growth of the WSP water modelling capability.
* Ensures project related quality processes are carried out (technical reviews, verification, approval to release etc.) in a timely and cost\\-effectively manner.
* Undertakes appropriate verification of all inputs and outputs on hydraulic modelling projects including GIS, SCADA, field data and growth projections.
* Provides regular feedback to team members in a constructive and timely manner.
* Completes tasks within allocated timeframes and budgeted hours.
* Ensures all technical risks are understood, managed, assigned to the organisation best placed to manage the risk, and these are well communicated with the project team, and/or client
* Solves problems effectively by applying knowledge of hydraulics and engaging sound problem solving techniques and appropriate analysis to find value engineered/innovative solutions.
* Maintains knowledge of appropriate technical standards, legislation, codes of practice and New Zealand standards; Is knowledgeable on industry developments, trends, and processes.
* Applies sound judgement to decisions about technical issues and solves problems for clients to get the best possible outcome for a project.
* Undertakes appropriate verification of projects and team members’ work.
* Considering risks to client’s business or reputation as part of the planning and management of projects.
* Delivering excellent service to clients to promote repeat and uncompetitive work.
* Develops and maintains an extensive network of industry contacts in India and NZ (as a minimum) and is readily able to access key people.
* Builds and maintains strong, trusted relationships with clients.
* Actively seeks feedback from clients and communicate this to the team to ensure successful delivery of projects and lessons learnt.
* Ensure projects and variations are scoped and priced in a manner that will ensure commercial success and that respond to the specific risk profile of the project.
* Writes and supports bids that are commercially astute, recognises and manages commercial risks while demonstrating value to the client.
* Hold focused meetings that achieve appropriate outcomes at key times; Deliver engaging, informative well\\-organized presentations; Create opportunities to share learnings, improvements, new tools, better practices etc with the wider water team.
* Liaise and work closely with Sector leadership and peer groups across India and New Zealand; Act as a brand ambassador of GCC within WSP in India across geographies.


**Required Skills And Behaviours**
* Fluent in spoken and written English and able to present ideas, complex technical information and advice in a way that is understandable to a wide range of audiences; Communicate difficult/sensitive information tactfully.
* Able to work effectively and competently with people at all levels; within and external to the organisation. Ability to work collaboratively and demonstrated capability to perform effectively as part of a team across a matrix type structure.
* Models WSP Guiding Principles.
* Strong organisational ability to optimise and prioritise conflicting demands in a busy environment, to achieve deadlines and see responsibilities through to completion; copes well under conflicting pressures.
* Commercial and a level of maturity needed to understand business needs and drivers.
* Projects a credible image and inspires confidence; Excellent interpersonal skills.
* Able to manage others and support them through stressful or challenging situations.
* Results orientated, with a reputation for, and demonstrated achievement of, key strategic priorities.
* Active commitment to continuous personal improvement.
* A team player and considers the views of others.
* Ensures that confidentiality is respected and maintained at all times.
* Consistently demonstrates trustworthiness, integrity, professionalism and honesty.
* Natural and confident leader displaying openness, accountability, decisiveness and engagement; Client centric and passionate about service excellence .
* Displays drive, energy and enthusiasm for getting things done with high levels of motivation and energy; Project credibility demonstrate professionalism and inspire confidence with high emotional intelligence and self\\-awareness of strengths and potential areas for development.
* Excellent analytical skills and strong attention to detail.
* Resilient, comfortable with change and ambiguity.


 Software Proficiencies
   

  

* Must be highly proficient in WS Pro software for all water supply network planning applications.
* Highly capable of developing own SQL or other user\\-script applications for Infoworks WS Pro.
* Proficient use of Windows, MS Word/Excel and other Microsoft Office applications.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering followed by a Masters in Water Resource Engineering or Environmental Engineering or similar
* Professional Registration (Chartered Engineer status or equivalent).


**Experience**
* Minimum of 15 years’ experience post qualification in water supply network planning, engineering and hydraulic modelling.
* Must have at least 8 years’ experience using WS Pro software and extensive use within the last 12 months.
* Demonstrable experience in developing SQL or other user\\-script applications for Infoworks WS Pro.
* Past experience in NZ, Australian or UK projects is preferred but not essential.


 BGV:
   

  

* Employment with WSP India is subject to the successful completion of a background verification (“BGV”) check conducted by a third\\-party agency appointed by WSP India.
* Candidates are advised to ensure that all information provided during the recruitment process — including documents uploaded — is accurate and complete, both to WSP India and its BGV partner”.


**About Us**
 WSP is one of the world's leading professional services consulting firms. We are dedicated to our local communities and propelled by international brainpower. We are technical experts and strategic advisors including engineers, technicians, scientists, architects, planners, surveyors and environmental specialists, as well as other design, program and construction management professionals. We design lasting solutions in the Transportation \\& Infrastructure, Property \\& Buildings, Earth \\& Environment, Power \\& Energy, Resources and Industry sectors, as well as offering strategic advisory services. Our talented people around the globe engineer projects that will help societies grow for lifetimes to come.
   

  

 With approximately
 **4,000 talented people** 
 across 3 locations (Noida, Bengaluru \\& Mumbai offices) in India and more than
 **73,000 globally** 
 , in 550
 **offices across 40 countries** 
 , we engineer projects that will help societies grow for lifetimes to come.
   

  

 At “WSP” we draw on the diverse skills and capabilities of our employees globally to compete for the most exciting and complex projects across the world and bring the same level of expertise to our local communities. We are proud to be an international collective of innovative thinkers who work on the most complex problems. Uniﬁed under one strong brand, we use our local expertise, international reach and global scale to prepare our cities and environments for the future, connect communities and help societies thrive in built and natural ecosystems. True to our guiding principles, our business is built on four cornerstones:
 **Our People, Our Clients, Our Operational Excellence and Our Expertise.**
**www.wsp.com**
**We are**
* Passionate people doing purposeful and sustainable work that helps shape our communities and the future.
* A collaborative team that thrives on challenges and unconventional thinking.
* A network of experts channeling our curiosity into creating solutions for complex issues.


***Inspired by diversity, driven by inclusion, we work with passion and purpose.***
**Working with Us**
 At WSP, you can access our global scale, contribute to landmark projects and connect with the brightest minds in your field to do the best work of your life. You can embrace your curiosity in a culture that celebrates new ideas and diverse perspectives. You can experience a world of opportunity and the chance to shape a career as unique as you.
   

  

**Our Hybrid Working Module**
 With us, you can operate in a flexible, agile, yet structured work environment and follow a Hybrid Work Model.
   

  

* Maximize collaboration.
* Maintain product quality and cultural integrity.
* Balance community, collaboration, opportunity, productivity, and efficiency.


**Health, Safety and Wellbeing**
 Our people are our greatest asset, and we prioritize a safe work environment. Health, safety, and wellbeing are integral to our culture, with each of us accountable for fostering a safe workplace through our “Making Health and Safety Personal” initiative. Our Zero Harm Vision drives us to reduce risks through innovative solutions, earning recognition for our global health and safety practices with the prestigious RoSPA Health and Safety Awards for six consecutive years.
   

  

**Inclusivity and Diversity**
 WSP India is dedicated to fostering a sustainable and inclusive work environment where our greatest strength \\- Our People \\-feel valued, respected, and supported. We ensure an unbiased approach in hiring, promotion, and performance evaluation, regardless of age, gender identity, race, religion, sexual orientation, marital status, physical ability, education, social status, or cultural background.
   

  

**Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.**
 Join our close\\-knit community of over 73,300 talented global professionals dedicated to making a positive impact. Together, we can make a difference in communities both near and far.
   

  

**With us, you can.
   

  

 Apply today.**
**NOTICE TO THIRD PARTY AGENCIES:**
*WSP does not accept unsolicited resumes from recruiters, employment agencies, or other staffing services. Unsolicited resumes include any resume or hiring document sent to WSP in the absence of a signed Service Agreement where WSP has expressly requested recruitment/staffing services specific to the position at hand. Any unsolicited resumes, including those submitted to hiring managers or other business leaders, will become the property of WSP and WSP will have the right to hire that candidate without reservation – no fee or other compensation will be owed or paid to the recruiter, employment agency, or other staffing service.*
